ogTitle: Skennars Head vs Skillion Flat: Climate Safety

heading: Skennars Head vs Skillion Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Skennars Head, New South Wales and Skillion Flat, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Skennars Head has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Skillion Flat (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Skennars Head or Skillion Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Skennars Head has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Skillion Flat scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Skennars Head scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Skillion Flat scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Skennars Head or Skillion Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Skennars Head has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
